animals.name: Gus
animals.description: Gus is a gentle senior hound mix who loves slow walks and soft beds. He’s looking for a calm home where he can enjoy his golden years.
animals.special_needs_description: Arthritis in hips and elbows; requires daily pain medication and joint supplements.
animals.health_notes: On long-term arthritis management plan; regular vet checkups every 6 months.

animals.name: Mabel
animals.description: Mabel is a sweet senior beagle with a big heart and an even bigger love of snacks.
animals.special_needs_description: Early-stage kidney disease; requires prescription diet and periodic bloodwork.
animals.health_notes: Doing well on special diet; no current mobility issues.

animals.name: Rusty
animals.description: Rusty is a lively senior shepherd mix who still enjoys playtime but also naps in the sun.
animals.health_notes: Healthy senior; regular age-appropriate vet care recommended.

animals.name: Coco
animals.description: Coco is a playful lab mix who loves fetch, water, and meeting new people.
animals.health_notes: Up to date on vaccinations and heartworm prevention.

animals.name: Willow
animals.description: Willow is a shy, soft-spoken tabby who blossoms in a calm, predictable environment.
animals.health_notes: Healthy; prefers hiding spots and slow introductions.

animals.name: Luna
animals.description: Luna is a reserved black cat who bonds deeply once she feels safe.
animals.health_notes: No known health issues; may hide from visitors at first.

animals.name: Jasper
animals.description: Jasper is an outgoing orange tabby who adores toys and attention.

animals.name: Smokey
animals.description: Smokey is a dignified senior who prefers sunny windowsills and quiet company.
animals.special_needs_description: Mild hyperthyroidism managed with daily medication.
animals.health_notes: Requires pill twice daily; stable on current dose.

animals.name: Thumper
animals.description: Thumper is a curious rabbit who loves tunnels and cardboard boxes.
animals.health_notes: Requires a rabbit-savvy vet and proper diet of hay and greens.

animals.name: Sunny
animals.description: Sunny is a bright yellow cockatiel who whistles cheerful tunes.
animals.health_notes: Requires large cage and daily out-of-cage time.

animals.name: Maple
animals.description: Maple is a cheerful young dog who is still learning her manners.

animals.name: Nala
animals.description: Nala is a playful young cat who enjoys climbing and feather toys.

animals.name: Bruno
animals.description: Bruno is a calm, steady companion who enjoys leisurely strolls.
animals.special_needs_description: History of ACL repair; should avoid high-impact activities.
animals.health_notes: Walks well on leash; joint supplements recommended.

animals.name: Poppy
animals.description: Poppy is a friendly pygmy goat who enjoys scratches and snacks.
animals.health_notes: Requires secure fencing and herd companionship.

animals.name: Daisy
animals.description: Daisy is a playful kitten who loves wand toys and lap time.
animals.health_notes: Needs continued kitten vaccines and spay when age-appropriate.

animals.name: Olive
animals.description: Olive is a mellow tortoiseshell who prefers adults and a predictable routine.
animals.health_notes: Mild dental tartar; dental cleaning recommended in the future.

campaigns.name: Emergency Medical Fund
campaigns.short_summary: Provides urgent veterinary care, surgeries, and life-saving treatments for injured and ill animals.
campaigns.description: The Emergency Medical Fund ensures that we never have to say no to an animal in crisis. Your gift helps cover emergency surgeries, diagnostic tests, hospitalization, and specialized medications for animals who arrive with critical injuries or sudden illness. From car accident survivors to senior animals with complex conditions, this fund is their lifeline.

campaigns.name: Medical Emergencies Fund
campaigns.short_summary: Rapid-response fund for unplanned medical crises, from parvo outbreaks to emergency surgeries.
campaigns.description: When the unexpected happens  a litter with parvo, a dog hit by a car, or a cat needing urgent surgery  the Medical Emergencies Fund allows our team to act immediately. Gifts to this campaign are used where they are needed most in the moment, filling critical gaps not covered by other restricted funds.

campaigns.name: New Kennel Construction
campaigns.short_summary: Help build safer, quieter kennels so dogs like Gus and Mabel can heal in comfort.
campaigns.description: Our current dog kennels are at capacity and in need of major upgrades. The New Kennel Construction campaign will add 20 climate-controlled suites with sound-dampening, outdoor runs, and dedicated medical isolation spaces. This project will reduce stress, improve disease control, and allow us to save more dogs each year.

campaigns.name: Senior Animal Care Fund
campaigns.short_summary: Supports long-term care, diagnostics, and comfort items for senior animals at the sanctuary.
campaigns.description: Senior animals like Gus, Mabel, and Smokey often stay longer at the sanctuary and require extra support. This fund covers ongoing medications, mobility aids, special diets, and regular lab work so they can enjoy their golden years in comfort while waiting for a forever home or permanent sanctuary placement.

campaigns.name: General Operations & Rescue Fund
campaigns.short_summary: Keeps the sanctuary running every day  from food and utilities to staffing and transport.
campaigns.description: Unrestricted gifts to the General Operations & Rescue Fund provide flexible support wherever it is needed most. This includes daily care like food, litter, bedding, and cleaning supplies, as well as transportation for rescues, utilities, and essential staffing. When you give here, you help every animal at the sanctuary.

campaigns.name: Tribute & Honor Gifts Fund
campaigns.short_summary: Allows donors to celebrate or remember loved ones while supporting rescue animals.
campaigns.description: Gifts made in honor or in memory of a loved one are directed to the Tribute & Honor Gifts Fund, which supports critical programs across the sanctuary. From emergency medical care to enrichment toys, these donations create a lasting legacy of compassion in the honorees name.
